name: Sort of Egg Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole wheat pita pockets OR 4 Slices of whole wheat bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the eggs for 5 minutes. Run them under cold water and peel.
2. Separate the egg whites from the yolks and discard the yolks.
3. Chop the egg whites.
4. Combine the chopped egg whites with the remaining ingredients.
5. Serve on whole wheat pita pockets or in slices of whole wheat bread.
One ounce serving equals a half cup (4 ounces) of egg salad in one whole wheat pita or two slices of whole wheat bread.
Per serving: 299 calories, 19 grams of protein, 48 grams of carbohydrate, 566 milligrams of sodium, 4 grams of fat (13 percent of calories).
